projects.title: AssetOSX
projects.description: Enterprise media logistics platform handling multi-stage workflows, approvals, permissions, and billing.

projects.title: Jarvis
projects.description: AI command center, agents, memory system, and execution dashboard with internal Mission Control UI.

projects.title: OpenClaw Integration
projects.description: LLM routing, budget enforcement, rate limiting, and provider abstraction.

projects.title: Cortana AI
projects.description: User-facing AI product layer with assistant interface, workflow automation, and user memory.

projects.title: Medellin Social Club
projects.description: Premium membership platform with onboarding, membership tiers, events, and admin tools in the main app.

objectives.title: Deploy Multi-Stage Workflows & Media Gating
objectives.description: Design and deploy the core state machine mapping media assets from physical on-site handling to post-production and final delivery.

objectives.title: Restructure Org Hierarchy & Dynamic Approvals
objectives.description: Build nested organizational models allowing complex client hierarchies (parent corp, agencies, teams) and mapped approval rights.

objectives.title: Integrate Stripe Billing & Technician Payouts
objectives.description: Implement end-to-end financial workflows mapping client SaaS billing to automated contractor/technician payouts.

objectives.title: Establish Technician Lifecycle & Permissions
objectives.description: End-to-end management of on-site technicians, from vetting and equipment assignment to rating and offboarding.

objectives.title: Architect Execution Dashboard & Projects Container
objectives.description: Build the central nervous system UI and backend containers where all high-level projects and statuses are monitored.

objectives.title: Build Agent Lifecycle & Orchestration Engine
objectives.description: Create the core control plane that spawns, monitors, and terminates autonomous AI agents across the system.

objectives.title: Develop Memory System (Projects, Knowledge, Decisions)
objectives.description: Establish Long-Term Memory (LTM) utilizing vector databases and structural logs to give Jarvis persistent context.

objectives.title: System Brain & Autonomous Prioritization
objectives.description: Create an autonomous decision matrix that ranks tasks, assigns computing resources, and acts dynamically without prompts.

objectives.title: Provider Abstraction & Model Routing
objectives.description: Create a universal interface to abstract Anthropic, OpenAI, Local models, and Groq behind a single intelligent router.

objectives.title: Budget Enforcement & Telemetry
objectives.description: Deploy strict financial guardrails to prevent token-burn alongside massive observability into model performance.

objectives.title: Fallback Mechanisms & Offline Degradation
objectives.description: Ensure the execution engine never fails entirely by routing down to smaller models progressively if outages occur.

objectives.title: System Prompt Management & Guardrails
objectives.description: Build centralized tools for managing, versioning, and testing core AI system prompts across all capabilities.

objectives.title: Primary Assistant Interface
objectives.description: Build the polished, user-facing conversational product layer focusing on speed, context, and immediate actionability.

objectives.title: Workflow Automation Integrations
objectives.description: Transform the assistant from absolute text into an agent that connects to external tools, APIs, and executes complex logic.

objectives.title: User Memory & Personalization Engine
objectives.description: Establish long-term persistent context so the AI remembers the user's preferences, projects, and biographical facts natively.

objectives.title: Local Device Control & OS Integration
objectives.description: Extend the assistant beyond the browser, allowing native desktop and mobile interactions like file management and application control.

objectives.title: Invite-Only Onboarding System
objectives.description: Build an ultra-exclusive, highly vetted onboarding pipeline utilizing rich user data extraction and review gating.

objectives.title: Event Management & Experience Booking
objectives.description: Deploy a global event system with strict access controls, limited inventory, and dynamic tier-based visibility.

objectives.title: Admin Concierge & Members Directory
objectives.description: Provide premium concierge tools and a carefully curated internal directory for members to network.

objectives.title: Internal Trust & Moderation Engine
objectives.description: Ensure the community remains high-quality through automated flagging, strike systems, and strict content moderation.

tasks.title: Architect media state machine DB schema
tasks.description: Design states (ingest, raw, proxy, review, approved, delivered) and audit logs for transitions.
checklist: Write unit tests for invalid transitions

tasks.title: Implement high-throughput presigned URL ingestion
tasks.description: Create the ingestion API that generates S3 presigned URLs for raw multi-gigabyte files.

tasks.title: Establish proxy generation queue worker
tasks.description: Build an EventBridge + Lambda pipeline to automatically generate 720p proxies from raw 4K footage.

tasks.title: Develop Media Gating access control middleware
tasks.description: Create permissions middleware that blocks unapproved clients from accessing raw bucket URLs.

tasks.title: Implement multi-file batch approval endpoints
tasks.description: Create atomic endpoints for clients/reviewers to approve, reject, or request changes on a batch of files.

tasks.title: Build robust file versioning logic
tasks.description: Allow editors to upload specific revisions of a file without overwriting the master file history.

tasks.title: Create watermarking proxy service
tasks.description: Automatically burn in timecodes and client names into proxy clips for secure review gating.

tasks.title: Develop on-site media offload validation
tasks.description: Build a utility/API for on-site technicians to verify checksums (MD5) before marking offload complete.

tasks.title: Build external client share-link generator
tasks.description: Implement securely hashed, time-expiring share links for unauthenticated reviewers.
checklist: Implement AES encryption for link parameters

tasks.title: Implement CDN edge caching for proxies
tasks.description: Configure CloudFront to aggressively cache review proxies to reduce latency for global clients.

tasks.title: Design nested organization DB schema
tasks.description: Move from flat tenant model to hierarchical structural tables (Organization, Department, Team).
checklist: Write recursive CTE queries for ancestry

tasks.title: Develop RBAC matrix mapping
tasks.description: Define standard roles (Admin, Manager, Creative, Viewer) across organizational scopes.

tasks.title: Implement dynamic approval workflows
tasks.description: Allow organizations to define custom multi-step approval pipelines (e.g. Legal -> Brand -> Final).

tasks.title: Build custom client dashboard scopes
tasks.description: Ensure clients only see assets assigned to their specific nodes in the organizational tree.
checklist: Apply RLS (Row Level Security) via Prisma

tasks.title: Implement cross-org sharing mechanisms
tasks.description: Allow a parent corp to securely delegate specific asset visibility down to an external agency.

tasks.title: Create organizational onboarding workflows
tasks.description: Automate the process for a new client adopting the system, including default role generation.

tasks.title: Build team membership invitation system
tasks.description: Develop email + token based invites with specific role assignments tied to a sub-department.

tasks.title: Develop audit trail reporting API
tasks.description: Expose endpoints for enterprise clients to download CSVs of all user actions (views, downloads, approvals).

tasks.title: Implement automated NDA gatekeeping
tasks.description: Require new members in specific organizational units to accept a digital NDA before accessing the hierarchy.

tasks.title: Migrate legacy user roles to new hierarchy
tasks.description: Write standard operating procedures and migration scripts to port current users without data loss.
checklist: Map old roles to new matrix

tasks.title: Implement Stripe Connect for technicians
tasks.description: Setup custom Stripe Connect onboarding flows to allow technicians to receive payouts directly.

tasks.title: Build metered storage billing logic
tasks.description: Calculate daily bucket sizes per client and report to Stripe usage-based billing endpoints.

tasks.title: Develop project-based invoicing system
tasks.description: Allow admins to trigger manual line-item invoices for on-site productions inside the app.

tasks.title: Implement automated contractor ledger
tasks.description: When a project completes, calculate technician splits and queue payouts on the internal ledger.

tasks.title: Create manual payout override controls
tasks.description: Give admins a UI back-office endpoint to hold, reverse, or boost a technician's payout before execution.

tasks.title: Sync Stripe subscription statuses
tasks.description: Listen to subscription updated/deleted webhooks and automatically restrict or downgrade orgs.
checklist: Map status to Org active flag

tasks.title: Implement tax documentation collection
tasks.description: Use Stripe or internal forms to ensure W9s/1099s are collected before payouts exceed threshold.
checklist: Block payouts over $600 without tax info

tasks.title: Develop client billing dashboard API
tasks.description: Aggregate current cycle usage, past invoices, and active subscriptions for the client portal.

tasks.title: Build cost-margin reporting engine
tasks.description: Compare incoming client invoice payments against outgoing technician payouts to evaluate project margins.

tasks.title: Implement failed payment dunning logic
tasks.description: Create a systematic workflow for retrying failed invoices and gradually restricting platform access.

tasks.title: Design Technician profile database schema
tasks.description: Store skills, certifications, equipment lists, and geographic availability.

tasks.title: Build equipment manifest module
tasks.description: Allow techs to register specific gear (cameras, lenses) making them searchable for specific project needs.

tasks.title: Implement geography-based assignment routing
tasks.description: Create an API to pull available technicians within a 50-mile radius of a new production location.

tasks.title: Develop post-project rating engine
tasks.description: Allow Project Managers to submit 5-star ratings and private notes on technician performance.
checklist: Implement decay curves for old ratings

tasks.title: Build automated availability checking
tasks.description: Send SMS or email pings to candidate technicians for a new job, locking in the first to accept.

tasks.title: Create strike system for no-shows
tasks.description: Implement a moderation protocol that automatically flags or suspends technicians with repeated infractions.

tasks.title: Implement NDA and IP tracking per technician
tasks.description: Track which sensitive projects a technician has touched and enforce strict IP offboarding.

tasks.title: Develop real-time on-site status tracking
tasks.description: Allow technicians to check-in/out of locations via GPS to verify time logic.

tasks.title: Build credential verification workflows
tasks.description: Create internal admin queues for manually verifying driver's licenses, passports, or union cards.
checklist: Build upload presign for secure docs

tasks.title: Implement tier-progression system
tasks.description: Create logic that promotes technicians from Junior to Lead based on successful completions and high ratings.

tasks.title: Develop isolated Project Container data models
tasks.description: Create logical boundaries ensuring specific agents and memories are sandboxed within a Project ID.

tasks.title: Build unified execution dashboard API
tasks.description: Aggregate task velocity, active agent processes, and blockers into a single summary payload.

tasks.title: Implement internal Mission Control views
tasks.description: Render global views of all active tasks and AI streams, replacing legacy hardcoded models.

tasks.title: Develop unified project configuration files
tasks.description: Allow projects to have a `jarvis.json` or YAML defining specific agent rules and environment variables.

tasks.title: Build global timeline visualization data layer
tasks.description: Format tasks and agent activities into a timeline structure for UI rendering (Gantt-style).

tasks.title: Implement WebSockets for real-time task updates
tasks.description: Push real-time state changes from backend directly to the Mission Control dashboard.

tasks.title: Create quick-action command palette
tasks.description: Allow power-users to trigger background scripts or task creations via a keyboard-first API overlay.

tasks.title: Develop cross-project dependency graphs
tasks.description: Allow Task A in Jarvis to block Task B in AssetOSX, visualizing these nodes via API.

tasks.title: Implement global search across all containers
tasks.description: Index all tasks, files, and project metadata into a unified search endpoint.

tasks.title: Build automated project health scoring
tasks.description: Run heuristics (stale tasks, missing updates) to assign a Red/Yellow/Green status to projects.

tasks.title: Implement persistent Agent State Machine
tasks.description: Define initialization, processing, waiting, and dead states for agents mapped into the database.

tasks.title: Develop Docker-based execution sandboxes
tasks.description: Spawn agents into isolated Docker containers to prevent rogue system access during execution.

tasks.title: Architect agent-to-agent message bus
tasks.description: Use Redis Pub/Sub or similar queue to allow heterogeneous agents to pass JSON payloads and context reliably.

tasks.title: Build filesystem control plane for agents
tasks.description: Provide agents with restricted virtual filesystems mapping back to real directories with strict bounds.

tasks.title: Implement autonomous task consumption logic
tasks.description: Allow designated agents to pull 'todo' tasks, analyze them, and transition them to 'in_progress'.
checklist: Add LLM decision step for suitability

tasks.title: Develop agent timeout and kill switches
tasks.description: Automatically terminate agents that loop infinitely or exceed expected runtime thresholds.

tasks.title: Build agent capability registration system
tasks.description: Allow new agents to register themselves and their specific toolsets to the orchestration engine.

tasks.title: Implement human-in-the-loop blocking states
tasks.description: When an agent lacks confidence, it must pause and request human input securely via the DB.
checklist: Send webhook alert to Mission Control

tasks.title: Develop cost-accumulation tracking per agent
tasks.description: Track total token usage and map cost to the specific agent instance and task it was performing.

tasks.title: Build replayable execution traces
tasks.description: Store exact prompts, tool calls, and LLM responses natively so any agent's workflow can be precisely debugged.

tasks.title: Architect multi-tiered memory taxonomy
tasks.description: Create structural divisions between ephemeral context, project rules, and global immutable knowledge.

tasks.title: Implement Pinecone/ChromaDB integrations
tasks.description: Set up vector database clusters for semantic retrieval of past decisions and codebase specifics.

tasks.title: Build automatic codebase ingestion engine
tasks.description: Periodically scan git repositories, chunk files, and generate embeddings for agent search.

tasks.title: Develop decision abstraction layers
tasks.description: When an agent concludes a task, automatically distill the 'why' and store it as a core architectural principle.

tasks.title: Implement context-window management logic
tasks.description: Dynamically construct prompts by querying vector DB and packing relevant memory without exceeding limits.

tasks.title: Build memory conflict resolution algorithms
tasks.description: When a new rule contradicts an old one, synthesize the conflict or flag for human review.

tasks.title: Develop memory decay and forgetting curves
tasks.description: Slowly deprecate older, less-accessed episodic memories to keep retrieval fast and context sharp.

tasks.title: Implement user preference memory layer
tasks.description: Specifically track the founder's explicit instructions (e.g. 'Never use tabs') globally across all agents.

tasks.title: Build episodic task logging
tasks.description: Store complete histories of high-complexity tasks as 'episodes' for few-shot prompting in the future.

tasks.title: Develop memory debugging interface
tasks.description: Create a UI view to manually inspect, edit, or delete the vector embeddings and raw memories.

tasks.title: Implement Eisenhower Matrix prioritization heuristics
tasks.description: Algorithmically weigh urgency, dependency locks, and project priority to rank global tasks.

tasks.title: Develop autonomous routine triggers
tasks.description: Allow the Brain to spawn agents daily for maintenance, code review, or status checking without human input.

tasks.title: Build resource allocation dynamic limits
tasks.description: If multiple projects demand agents, prioritize high-value projects while restricting token usage for lower tiers.

tasks.title: Implement deadline anticipation modeling
tasks.description: Analyze task history to predict if an objective will miss its due date and alert the founder proactively.

tasks.title: Develop multi-agent debate protocols
tasks.description: For architectural decisions, spawn two agents with different system prompts to debate and reach consensus.

tasks.title: Build system anomaly detection
tasks.description: Monitor error rates, high latency, or weird agent loops and trigger a global 'defcon' state if necessary.

tasks.title: Implement asynchronous user-polling hooks
tasks.description: If the Brain needs input on priority, queue an async message to the user and wait across sessions.
checklist: Map response back to Brain context

tasks.title: Develop cost-benefit analysis endpoints
tasks.description: Before starting a massive DB migration task, estimate total LLM cost and require founder approval if over $X.
checklist: Estimate token count via task size

tasks.title: Build objective auto-generation logic
tasks.description: Allow Jarvis to look at a high-level goal and automatically break it down into 10 executable tasks.

tasks.title: Deploy the 'Founder Mode' override system
tasks.description: A simple global toggle that immediately pauses all autonomous execution, leaving only manual control.

tasks.title: Architect Unified Model Interface
tasks.description: Design a common interface ensuring payloads for all providers normalize gracefully.

tasks.title: Implement intelligent model routing logic
tasks.description: Dynamically choose Claude for coding, GPT-4 for reasoning, and Local/Groq for fast classification.

tasks.title: Develop Groq integration for sub-50ms tasks
tasks.description: Set up specific high-speed pipelines to Groq for cheap, rapid tasks like JSON validation.

tasks.title: Build streaming normalization wrapper
tasks.description: Ensure Server-Sent Events (SSE) from different APIs look identical to downstream Jarvis consumers.

tasks.title: Implement multimodal abstraction logic
tasks.description: Abstract image and audio inputs uniformly regardless of the targeted provider.

tasks.title: Develop local model failover via Ollama
tasks.description: Allow seamless degradation to local Ollama models if external APIs drop or budget hits zero.

tasks.title: Build system prompt injection middleware
tasks.description: Create standard layers that silently inject context/memory before the request hits the provider.

tasks.title: Implement tool-calling unified registry
tasks.description: Standardize how tools are sent and invoked across Anthropic and OpenAI formats.

tasks.title: Develop retry and backoff mechanisms
tasks.description: Implement exponential backoff specifically tuned to the rate limits of each provider.

tasks.title: Build prompt caching optimizations
tasks.description: Integrate Anthropic's prompt caching for massive system prompts to drastically reduce costs.

tasks.title: Develop global budget enforcement layer
tasks.description: Hard-stop all requests if global daily/monthly token costs exceed configured bounds.

tasks.title: Implement cost attribution per project/agent
tasks.description: Track exact costs and assign them to specific internal projects to identify expensive workflows.
checklist: Map cost to Project ID in DB

tasks.title: Build latency and Time-to-First-Token monitoring
tasks.description: Log millisecond-accurate TTFT and total request times for every LLM call.

tasks.title: Develop automated context-window throttling
tasks.description: If cost spikes locally, force models to dynamically truncate context or use cheaper models.

tasks.title: Implement prompt injection defense proxy
tasks.description: Run lightweight heuristics or local models to scan inputs for jailbreaks before expensive API calls.

tasks.title: Build response quality scoring mechanisms
tasks.description: Randomly sample LLM outputs and use a secondary cheaper model to assign a quality score (1-10).

tasks.title: Develop API Key rotation and secret management
tasks.description: Securely rotate keys programmatically without downtime, handling multiple workspace environments.

tasks.title: Implement real-time billing dashboard
tasks.description: Create a UI component in Mission Control showing rolling 24hr costs categorized by provider.

tasks.title: Build webhook alerting for rate-limits
tasks.description: Push alerts directly to Slack/Discord if OpenAI or Anthropic starts returning excessive 429s.

tasks.title: Develop offline reconciliation engine
tasks.description: Nightly, pull exact API usage logs from OpenAI/Anthropic and reconcile against internal estimates.

tasks.title: Architect the degradation staircase model
tasks.description: Design rules for shifting from Claude 3 Opus -> Sonnet -> Haiku -> GPT-3.5 -> Local based on load.

tasks.title: Implement offline capability detection
tasks.description: On startup, detect available local Docker instances or local Ollama bins for offline capabilities.
checklist: Register local models to internal registry

tasks.title: Develop semantic parity checks
tasks.description: When downgrading from GPT-4 to Haiku, ensure the system prompt is rewritten to fit the smaller model's context.

tasks.title: Build automated API status polling
tasks.description: Constantly ping provider `/v1/models` endpoints to determine uptime independent of user requests.

tasks.title: Implement long-running offline batching
tasks.description: If internet drops, queue low-priority tasks locally and process them automatically upon reconnect.

tasks.title: Develop strict fallback circuit breakers
tasks.description: Avoid infinite loops across APIs by limiting fallback attempts to max 3 layers before halting the task.

tasks.title: Build local embeddings failover
tasks.description: If Pinecone or OpenAI embeddings drop, seamlessly switch to a local SentenceTransformers model.

tasks.title: Implement fallback logging and analytics
tasks.description: Track exactly how often Jarvis degrades to offline models and calculate the cost savings or latency hits.

tasks.title: Develop failover testing harnesses
tasks.description: Create simulated outages to test if the Jarvis orchestration engine successfully switches to Ollama within 100ms.

tasks.title: Implement data residency constraints
tasks.description: Allow certain project IDs to forbid API routing, enforcing that sensitive files are ONLY processed via local failovers.
checklist: Return pre-flight errors on API attempt

tasks.title: Architect the Prompt Registry DB schema
tasks.description: Create tables to hold versioned prompt templates, variables, and performance metadata.

tasks.title: Implement variable interpolation engine
tasks.description: Allow dynamic injection of context (e.g. {{user_name}}, {{current_date}}) into raw prompts at runtime.

tasks.title: Develop prompt version control UI
tasks.description: Build an internal dashboard to edit, rollback, and branch system prompts like a Git repository.

tasks.title: Build A/B testing framework for prompts
tasks.description: Route 10% of agent tasks to 'Prompt Variant B' and measure explicit success rates automatically.

tasks.title: Implement rigorous guardrail middleware
tasks.description: Run an explicit check on outputs ensuring they match predefined JSON schemas before passing back to Jarvis.

tasks.title: Develop automated regression testing for prompts
tasks.description: Before deploying a prompt update, run it against 50 past task logs to verify it still solves them correctly.

tasks.title: Implement role-playing personality consistency
tasks.description: Ensure the 'Cortana' user-facing prompts maintain a specific tone, separating them from dry 'Jarvis' system prompts.

tasks.title: Build external prompt fetching API
tasks.description: Allow authorized external apps to fetch the latest approved system prompts via JWT.

tasks.title: Develop toxicity and bias scanners
tasks.description: Scan LLM outputs periodically for unacceptable language or biases, especially in user-facing Cortana logs.

tasks.title: Implement dynamic context injection caps
tasks.description: Automatically truncate historical messages or vector memories if the assembled prompt exceeds the model's max limit.

tasks.title: Architect main chat UI component
tasks.description: Build the core React/Next.js interface with extremely low-latency streaming and markdown rendering.

tasks.title: Implement polymorphic action rendering
tasks.description: When Cortana returns structured data, render a UI widget (e.g. a chart or interactive card) instead of raw text.

tasks.title: Develop local offline queue system
tasks.description: If the user drops connection, queue chat messages locally via IndexedDB and sync upon reconnect.

tasks.title: Build context-aware file attachments
tasks.description: Allow users to drag-and-drop PDFs, images, or code files instantly attaching them to the context window.

tasks.title: Implement branching conversation trees
tasks.description: Allow users to 'edit' a past message, branching the core conversation invisibly without losing history.
checklist: Write logic to traverse tree branches

tasks.title: Develop natural language command parsing
tasks.description: Detect slash commands or explicit directives (e.g. '/deploy') inside chat and route to fast background services.
checklist: Bypass main LLM for strict commands

tasks.title: Build personalized voice-input integration
tasks.description: Use Whisper API to allow seamless voice interactions, auto-sending when user stops speaking.

tasks.title: Implement cross-platform syncing
tasks.description: Ensure active chat sessions, typed inputs, and history sync perfectly via WebSockets across desktop and mobile.

tasks.title: Develop contextual 'suggestions' engine
tasks.description: Analyze current screen state or recent messages to provide 3 highly relevant quick-action buttons.
checklist: Feed context to fast Groq model

tasks.title: Build accessibility and keyboard-first navigation
tasks.description: Ensure the entire chat interface, works flawlessly without a mouse.

tasks.title: Architect external API integration framework
tasks.description: Create a standardized plugin system allowing Cortana to securely hold OAuth tokens and hit external REST APIs.

tasks.title: Implement Google Workspace integrations
tasks.description: Allow reading and drafting emails, modifying calendar events, and extracting Drive documents.

tasks.title: Develop multi-step trigger automation
tasks.description: Allow the assistant to build 'When X happens, do Y' background automations for the user.

tasks.title: Build local system execution tools
tasks.description: Provide a secure bridge allowing Cortana to run local shell scripts or modify local files based on user requests.

tasks.title: Implement human-in-loop approval for workflows
tasks.description: When a workflow initiates a destructive action, require one-click UI confirmation.

tasks.title: Develop custom API builder interface
tasks.description: Allow the founder to paste a Swagger/OpenAPI spec, automatically generating a usable tool within Cortana's context.

tasks.title: Build automated summarization crons
tasks.description: Schedule Cortana to read specified RSS feeds or emails daily, generating a morning brief.

tasks.title: Implement Stripe and financial integrations
tasks.description: Connect viewing dashboards of revenue, failed payments, and executing internal refunds via chat commands.

tasks.title: Develop contextual browser extension
tasks.description: Create an extension that can inject the current active web page text directly into Cortana's context window.

tasks.title: Build failure recovery for automations
tasks.description: If an API breaks mid-workflow, allow the assistant to use its reasoning capability to find an alternative route or notify.
checklist: Inject error logs to LLM context

tasks.title: Architect the Graph Memory database for users
tasks.description: Map user relationships, preferences, and facts using a Graph DB approach suitable for the LLM to query.

tasks.title: Implement implicit preference extraction
tasks.description: Analyze ongoing chat patterns silently in the background to deduce and store preferences (e.g., 'Prefers bullet points').

tasks.title: Develop explicit 'Remember this' functions
tasks.description: Create a direct slash command (`/remember`) that instantly commits a specific string to permanent memory with priority weighting.

tasks.title: Build context-window distillation algorithms
tasks.description: Prevent the prompt size from bloating by distilling old session logs into dense summary paragraphs nightly.
checklist: Replace old chat rows with summaries

tasks.title: Implement user emotion and tone matching
tasks.description: Dynamically shift Cortana's response tone (formal, empathetic, concise) based on the user's current session sentiment.

tasks.title: Develop multi-device session continuity
tasks.description: Ensure that a user ending a voice chat in the car can immediately resume the exact context on desktop text chat.
checklist: Store active context in Redis cache

tasks.title: Build biometric or secure voice identification
tasks.description: Authenticate the user via voice print before exposing highly sensitive financial context within a voice session.
checklist: Integrate Azure Voice ID or similar

tasks.title: Implement proactive 'check-in' capabilities
tasks.description: Allow Cortana to initiate conversations based on calendar events or external triggers without user input.

tasks.title: Develop memory debugging and deletion UI
tasks.description: Give the user an interface to see exactly 'what Cortana knows about me' and easily delete incorrect facts.

tasks.title: Build specialized 'Coding Persona' memory triggers
tasks.description: Automatically switch memory contexts if the user says 'Let's write code', loading their preferred languages and git setups.

tasks.title: Architect Tauri-based Desktop Application
tasks.description: Wrap the web experience in a Rust-based Tauri app to gain native OS capabilities without massive overhead.

tasks.title: Implement bidirectional file system bridging
tasks.description: Allow Cortana to securely read local directories and create files when instructed by the user.
checklist: Expose safe invoke targets to JS

tasks.title: Develop AppleScript / PowerShell execution layers
tasks.description: Give the assistant tools to open native applications, adjust volume, or move windows on the user's machine.

tasks.title: Build global keyboard shortcut triggers
tasks.description: Allow hitting a universal hotkey (e.g., Cmd+Space) to instantly summon the Cortana interface over any application.

tasks.title: Implement local clipboard context injection
tasks.description: Add a tool that allows Cortana to automatically read the OS clipboard if the user references it (e.g. 'Fix this code').

tasks.title: Develop native notifications and deep linking
tasks.description: Push system notifications that link directly back into specific conversational states or required approvals.

tasks.title: Build offline Llama.cpp degradation model
tasks.description: Embed a lightweight local model directly in the desktop app for basic tasks if Wi-Fi is unavailable.

tasks.title: Implement local calendar and contact syncing
tasks.description: Allow the app to read native Apple Contacts or Outlook locally without relying exclusively on cloud OAuth.

tasks.title: Develop 'Screen Context' snapshotting
tasks.description: Take scheduled screenshots (with explicit permission), process via local OCR, to give the assistant context on what the user is looking at.

tasks.title: Build isolated execution environments (Sandboxing)
tasks.description: Ensure any shell scripts drafted by the AI are executed within a restricted local Docker container or tight sandbox.

tasks.title: Architect multi-step application database schema
tasks.description: Define complex application states, tracking external data, social links, and internal referral webs.

tasks.title: Build dynamic encrypted application forms
tasks.description: Create frontend form components that store data progressively and handle rich media uploads securely.

tasks.title: Implement social graph referral verifications
tasks.description: Connect applicant profiles to existing members, mapping a network graph to identify trusted nodes.

tasks.title: Develop automated OSINT enrichment
tasks.description: When an application is submitted, use Clearbit or similar APIs to pull public LinkedIn/X data for verification.

tasks.title: Build the Admin Review Queue dashboard
tasks.description: Create a complex table view for admins to process, reject, or waitlist applications with bulk actions.

tasks.title: Implement secure magical-link authentication
tasks.description: Remove standard passwords entirely; use secure, expiring email/SMS links for login and application tracking.

tasks.title: Develop tiered waitlisting logic
tasks.description: Algorithmically slot approved users into specific waitlist positions based on internal scores and region caps.

tasks.title: Build localized Stripe onboarding flows
tasks.description: When off the waitlist, trigger a localized Stripe checkout page mapping to specific membership tiers.

tasks.title: Implement secret-keeper invite generation
tasks.description: Allow 'Founder' tier members to generate single-use, cryptographic invite codes that bypass standard waitlisting.

tasks.title: Develop welcome experience personalization
tasks.description: Upon first login, customize the portal UI, greeting, and available events based on the user's vetted persona.

tasks.title: Architect high-concurrency Event & Ticket schemas
tasks.description: Design robust models to handle hundreds of users attempting to book 20 available spots simultaneously.

tasks.title: Implement dynamic tier visibility rules
tasks.description: Ensure an exclusive 'Inner Circle' dinner is invisible to standard 'Member' tiers across all APIs.
checklist: Map tier enums to Event access rules

tasks.title: Develop location-aware event discovery
tasks.description: Filter and notify users of events happening in their current city or flagged travel destinations.

tasks.title: Build mobile-first booking UI flows
tasks.description: Create frictionless purchasing flows optimized specifically for iOS/Android WebView contexts.

tasks.title: Implement digital ticket generation via Apple/Google Wallet
tasks.description: Generate .pkpass files mapping internal RSVPs to native mobile wallets with dynamic QR codes.
checklist: Map QR codes to Booking IDs

tasks.title: Develop on-site QR scanner admin capability
tasks.description: Build a specific view inside the app for event staff to rapid-scan and check-in attendees via camera.

tasks.title: Build algorithmic event waitlists
tasks.description: If an event is full, allow users to join a queue; if a spot opens, auto-charge and notify the next in line.

tasks.title: Implement guest-pass allocation logic
tasks.description: Allow high-tier members to assign temporary digital guest passes to non-members for specific public events.

tasks.title: Develop post-event gallery and engagement features
tasks.description: Release locked photo galleries visible only to verified attendees, allowing discrete saving and sharing.

tasks.title: Build automated event ROI reporting
tasks.description: Generate financial reports for admins comparing ticket revenue versus estimated costs per experience.

tasks.title: Architect the Members Directory privacy schema
tasks.description: Allow users to opt-in or strictly obscure specific contact points (email, phone, socials) from other members.

tasks.title: Build high-performance directory search interface
tasks.description: Develop an Algolia-like instant search for the member base, filtering by industry, city, and interests.

tasks.title: Implement secure member-to-member direct messaging
tasks.description: Allow members to message each other within the platform without exposing native phone numbers or emails.

tasks.title: Develop dynamic Concierge request ticketing
tasks.description: Build a polished form where members can request specific global reservations or assistance mapping to a Zendesk-like admin queue.
checklist: Write webhook to internal Slack channel

tasks.title: Build the internal admin CMS for concierge
tasks.description: Give staff a dashboard to assign, track, and resolve member requests, charging the Stripe account directly if needed.

tasks.title: Implement AI-assisted concierge routing
tasks.description: Use LLMs to automatically categorize a user's request (e.g. 'Restaurant Booking' vs 'Travel Visa Assist') and auto-assign to the correct staff.

tasks.title: Develop 'City Guides' CMS & UI
tasks.description: Create curated, admin-managed city guides available to members based on their travel itineraries.

tasks.title: Build automated birthday and milestone triggers
tasks.description: Automatically alert the concierge team 7 days before a VIP member's birthday to organize gifts or experiences.

tasks.title: Implement global timezone synchronization
tasks.description: Ensure timezone-agnostic interactions where a member in Tokyo sees concierge availability and messages correctly mapped against staff in NY.

tasks.title: Develop cross-member 'Introduction' workflows
tasks.description: Allow members to officially request introductions to other members, brokered through the concierge team for privacy.

tasks.title: Architect global strike and moderation schema
tasks.description: Track specific user infractions (no-shows, harassment reports) maintaining a numerical strike tally against their profile.

tasks.title: Implement anonymous reporting APIs
tasks.description: Allow any member to report messages, profiles, or event behavior securely and anonymously to the moderation team.

tasks.title: Develop automated spam/solicitation detection
tasks.description: Scan member-to-member messages algorithmically for crypto-scams, unsolicited pitching, or mass-messaging.

tasks.title: Build the Moderation Queue UI
tasks.description: Create an isolated admin dashboard specifically for reviewing flagged content, providing quick buttons to ban, warn, or dismiss.
checklist: Render context of reported message natively

tasks.title: Implement algorithmic event no-show penalties
tasks.description: Automatically issue a strike and fine the member's underlying Stripe card if they RSVP but fail to check-in via QR.

tasks.title: Develop progressive account restriction mechanisms
tasks.description: If a user hits '2 strikes', restrict their ability to direct message other members for 30 days without fully banning them.
checklist: Map active restrictions to JWT tokens

tasks.title: Build external vetting data-refresh cron
tasks.description: Periodically re-verify members against public databases (e.g. criminal records, sanctions lists) to ensure ongoing compliance.

tasks.title: Implement automated warning generation
tasks.description: When admins hit 'Warn' on a minor infraction, use an LLM to generate a polite but firm custom warning email based on the context.
checklist: Review drafted email in UI before sending

tasks.title: Develop membership revocation workflows
tasks.description: Create a one-click 'Nuke' capability that handles banning the user, canceling active Stripe subs, refunding pending tickets, and deleting profile data.

tasks.title: Build the Appeals mechanism API
tasks.description: Allow restricted members a one-time 500-character submission box to explain circumstances or appeal decisions.
